etn 3.0.0.9000

    • Configure credentials
    • Options
  • Changelog

List all available animal project codes

Source: R/list_animal_project_codes.R
list_animal_project_codes.Rd

List all available animal project codes

Usage

list_animal_project_codes(connection)

Arguments

connection

A connection to the ETN database. This argument is no longer used. You will be prompted for credentials instead.

Value

A vector of all unique project_code of type = "animal" that are available.

See also

Other list functions: list_acoustic_project_codes(), list_acoustic_tag_ids(), list_animal_ids(), list_cpod_project_codes(), list_deployment_ids(), list_receiver_ids(), list_scientific_names(), list_station_names(), list_tag_serial_numbers(), list_values()

Examples

list_animal_project_codes()
#>   [1] "2004_Gudena"                    "2010_phd_reubens"              
#>   [3] "2010_phd_reubens_sync"          "2011_Loire"                    
#>   [5] "2011_rivierprik"                "2011_Warnow"                   
#>   [7] "2012_leopoldkanaal"             "2013_albertkanaal"             
#>   [9] "2013_Foyle"                     "2014_demer"                    
#>  [11] "2014_Frome"                     "2014_Nene"                     
#>  [13] "2015_Albertkanaal_VPS_Ham"      "2015_dijle"                    
#>  [15] "2015_fint"                      "2015_homarus"                  
#>  [17] "2015_PhD_Gutmann_Roberts"       "2015_phd_verhelst_cod"         
#>  [19] "2015_phd_verhelst_eel"          "2016_Albertkanaal_VPS_Ham"     
#>  [21] "2016_Diaccia_Botrona"           "2016_phd_vergeynst"            
#>  [23] "2017_Albertkanaal_VPS_Ham"      "2017_Fremur"                   
#>  [25] "2017_Iller"                     "2018_EC"                       
#>  [27] "2018_flapperskate"              "2018_Iller_VPS"                
#>  [29] "2019_Grotenete"                 "2019_Lake_Anundsjo_VPS"        
#>  [31] "2020_Gudena"                    "2020_PhD_Winter"               
#>  [33] "2021_Dijle_VPS"                 "2021_Gudena"                   
#>  [35] "2021_transcal"                  "2021_YEELAZ"                   
#>  [37] "2022_Albertkanaal_VPS_Hasselt"  "2022_Beaver_Durme"             
#>  [39] "2022_SEELAZ"                    "2023_european_eel_meuse"       
#>  [41] "2023_WaddenSea_YellowEel"       "2023_wels_catfish_meuse"       
#>  [43] "2024_allis_shad_rhine"          "2024_Anguilla_bb_Harlingen"    
#>  [45] "2024_BECO_IIM_BELAS"            "2024_dvw_fish_migration"       
#>  [47] "2025_IJmuidenRotterdam_SeaBass" "2025_langsdammen_animals"      
#>  [49] "2025_Nederrijn_Lek_animals"     "2025_NorthSeaCanal_Seatrout"   
#>  [51] "2025-2026_RijnWest_SilverEel"   "2025-28_NorthSeaNL_MONS_Elasmo"
#>  [53] "2026_PhD_Visser_animals"        "Aberdeen"                      
#>  [55] "ADST-Shark"                     "AFICHE"                        
#>  [57] "Allis_shad_migration_Oise_2024" "amsterdam"                     
#>  [59] "anja_phd"                       "ARAISOLA02"                    
#>  [61] "ARAISOLA03"                     "Ars"                           
#>  [63] "Artevigo"                       "ASMOP1"                        
#>  [65] "ASMOP2"                         "AZO"                           
#>  [67] "BALANCE"                        "Baltic_Sturgeon_Restoration"   
#>  [69] "BECORV"                         "BEM"

#>  [77] "Bodden_Pike"                    "brackishwater_perch"           
#>  [79] "brackishwater_pike"             "Brasem_IJM/MM"                 
#>  [81] "BristolChannelSalmon"           "BristolChannelSeaTrout"        
#>  [83] "BristolChannelShad"             "BristolChannelSkate"           
#>  [85] "BTN"                            "BTN_LOST"
